79957387.title: 2025–26 Wrexham A.F.C. season
79957387.extract: The 2025–26 season is the 161st season in the history of Wrexham Association Football Club and their first season back in the EFL Championship, second tier of English Football, since the 1981–82 season following promotion from League One in the preceding season. In addition to the league, they will compete in the FA Cup and advanced to the fourth round of the EFL Cup.
